meta.note: Single source of truth for sahilsapra.com. Both the website UI and the 'Ask Sahil' chatbot read from this file. Edit here, never in component code.

identity.name: Sahil Sapra
identity.title: Technical Product Manager
identity.heroSummary: Product leader in enterprise SaaS, QA automation, release quality, and agentic developer workflows.
identity.availability: Open to AI-first PM and TPM roles
identity.summary: Technical product manager with hands-on experience leading aviation B2B SaaS and AI-powered platform initiatives across product strategy, quality engineering, enterprise integrations, and scalable software delivery. Track record of driving product-market fit, accelerating go-to-market execution, growing ARR, and delivering operational efficiency through automation and AI-enabled workflows. Strong in Agile product management, CI/CD modernization, release control via feature flags, QA automation, and clear technical writing.

roles.title: Co-Founder & Head of Product
roles.summary: Directed an AI-powered, deploy-aware no-code agentic QA platform for SaaS — automated staging-environment mapping, test-case generation, execution, Jira validation, screenshot evidence, and release scheduling.

bullets.text: Secured four strategic design partners to validate product-market fit and accelerate early adoption across SaaS engineering teams.
Executed a six-month roadmap, delivered the MVP, and advanced V2/V3 builds — a Security Hub for dependency risk, GitHub integration, a developer CLI, and credit-based pricing.
Raised early pre-seed capital to support MVP development, customer discovery, and product validation.

roles.title: Technical Product Manager II
roles.summary: Led quality-engineering transformation — scaling automated testing frameworks and improving QA efficiency across cross-functional delivery pipelines.

bullets.text: Executed enterprise customer migration, onboarding 75 customers from competing FBO platforms to TFBO Next-Gen, sustaining 104% YoY ARR growth over two years.
Led the transition from a legacy monolith to a domain-driven microservices architecture (Java, Spring Boot, TypeScript, Angular) — reusable REST APIs, caching, RxJS, lazy loading.
Directed QA resource planning and automation strategy, improving test coverage with enterprise-grade release stability and regression assurance.
Accelerated delivery velocity through AI-driven workflow integration, shipping the Invoicing redesign five months early and reducing churn.

roles.title: Product Manager
roles.summary: Supported post-merger integration of multiple FBO products into CAMP's aircraft-maintenance suite following a $200M acquisition.

bullets.text: Led enterprise-wide adoption of LaunchDarkly, modernized CI/CD, and decoupled deployment from release cycles.
Built a LaunchDarkly API web app for centralized feature-flag control, reducing subscription costs.

roles.title: IT Business Analyst
roles.summary: Drove data-driven product improvements through continuous enhancement cycles, optimizing ERP workflows for aviation operations.

bullets.text: Spearheaded integrations connecting four accounting platforms and two loyalty programs into FBO360, expanding ecosystem capabilities.
Collaborated with engineering, QA, and stakeholders to improve reliability, scalability, and UX across FBO360 deployments.

roles.title: Business Intelligence Intern
roles.summary: Built dashboards, performed data modeling, and generated insights to inform product and business decisions.

bullets.text: Engineered seven Tableau dashboards on Snowflake SQL across four apps to surface usage patterns and reduce customer attrition.

roles.title: Summer Intern
roles.summary: Supported venture due diligence for the in-house investment fund.

bullets.text: Built Python classification models to evaluate ~250 early-stage startups, automating due diligence and surfacing 8 high-potential seed targets.

education.degree: M.S. in Computer Systems — AI Specialization
B.S. in Quantitative Economics · Co-Major Analytics · Minor CS

projects.name: EY Blockchain Case Competition
projects.blurb: Designed a blockchain solution to stop double-counting of vaccination records and fake CDC cards.
projects.detail: Built a mock decentralized public network on Ethereum with multiple validator nodes and varying encryption to store global vaccination records. Placed 2nd nationally.

projects.name: Redhawk Digital Asset Fund LLC
projects.blurb: Co-founded a student-run, university-funded cryptocurrency investment fund.
projects.detail: Founded with three other students; authored the investment thesis, IPS, and risk policy. Taught the university blockchain-basics course as an appointed instructor for the 2021–22 catalog.

projects.name: Startup Due-Diligence Classifier
projects.blurb: Python classification models that automated venture due diligence across ~250 early-stage startups.
projects.detail: Surfaced 8 high-potential seed targets for the in-house fund. Prepared DD reports and presented independent investments with ticket sizes up to $20M to PE groups and forum members.

projects.name: Tableau Analytics & ETL Automation
projects.blurb: Seven Tableau dashboards on Snowflake across four apps, plus an automated ETL pipeline.
projects.detail: Mined, cleaned, and modeled usage data to build seven dashboards. Automated ETL ingestion into Snowflake via Fivetran, increasing delivery speed ~300% and helping cut attrition 28%.

projects.name: P&G Consultancy Challenge
projects.blurb: Won first place in a Procter & Gamble consultancy competition for a product roll-out and GTM strategy.
projects.detail: Devised a business and marketing strategy as part of a partner consultancy project; recognized by P&G judges.

projects.name: Engineers Without Borders — Rwanda
projects.blurb: Supported an on-ground student engineering team in Rwanda with PM and CAD design.
projects.detail: Provided project-management support and produced AutoCAD pump blueprints for a clean-water installation project.

chatbot.subtitle: trained on Sahil's background
chatbot.greeting: Hey — I'm an AI agent trained on Sahil's experience. Ask me about his work at SpecHawk or CAMP, his QA-automation projects, his skills, or whether he's a fit for a role you're hiring for.
suggestedQuestions: What does Sahil do at SpecHawk?
What's his experience with QA automation?
Is he open to PM roles right now?
chatbot.escalationNote: For anything I can't answer, reach Sahil on LinkedIn — or book a quick call: https://calendar.app.google/Xzzeg1fmh5xmpgL77
